---
applyTo: "docs/**"
description: "Use when: reading docs or files under docs/**; require overview, API extraction, and Simplified Chinese summary."
---

When reading documentation under docs/**:
- First scan headings/sections to produce a short outline.
- Extract key APIs, commands, or configuration items with brief descriptions.
- Provide a concise summary in Simplified Chinese.
- Call out open questions or unclear sections as TODOs.
